pending.body:
finding_summary: The patch still lets the daemon guess a run identity in `persist_workflow_run_id`, so a manual rerun between dispatch completion and persistence can stamp the newer run onto the task and bypass the new fail-closed reconciliation guard.
severity: high
affected_files:
- src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs:1779-1810
- src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs:1941-1944
- src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs:7797-7948
remediation_hint: Stop deriving `workflow_run_id` from the latest `RunStarted` event. Persist the authoritative run id from the dispatch/result path or another deterministic artifact of the just-finished attempt; if that binding cannot be proven, leave the field unset so `try_reconcile_success` takes the new `reconciliation_no_run_binding` path.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 2 -> Plan and Implement
